revision_note: Pre-merge adversarial correction narrows admitted event systems to those carrying computable completeness certificates.

construction.continuous_state: represented by an effectively named state object together with certified rational enclosures
construction.flow: represented by one uniform refinement procedure yielding coherent trajectory enclosures for requested rational times and tolerances
construction.time: represented as an ordered real parameter through effective rational names rather than a fixed finite grid
construction.events: guard crossings and declared resets are represented only when accompanied by a finite event enumerator or certified crossing brackets and effective completeness data
construction.reasoning_history: commitments, grounds, dependencies, revisions, and evidential annotations remain distinct and time-indexed
construction.recovery: one uniform recovery interface reconstructs every finite requested observation and event certificate without source-specific decoding or undeclared missed-event search

reason: The construction proves faithful representation for a frozen effectively presented finite-dimensional Lipschitz continuous-dynamics subclass with computably certified finite event recovery. It does not cover uncertified isolated crossings, nonunique, Zeno, infinite-dimensional, noncomputable, or unrestricted continuous systems.
nonclaims: all continuous reasoning systems are represented
isolated guard crossings are computably recoverable without declared completeness evidence
finite numerical approximation is exact trajectory identity
all differential equations admit unique computable solutions
continuous dynamics establishes a universal kernel
FARA is necessary minimal or unique
the model corresponds to an actual physical process
